dag_flow_prompt: Implement a file upload endpoint using multer. Validate the file type and size.
baseline_prompt: Implement a file upload endpoint using multer. Validate the file type and size.

user_context.persona: a backend developer building a task management REST API that needs to support file attachments

feature_requirements.upload_destination: Local disk in uploads/ directory (relative to project root)
feature_requirements.endpoint: POST /api/upload — accepts single file field named 'file'
feature_requirements.success_response: HTTP 200 with JSON { filename: '<stored_name>', originalName: '<original>', size: <bytes> }

error_responses.wrong_type: HTTP 400 with JSON { error: 'Invalid file type' }
error_responses.too_large: HTTP 400 with JSON { error: 'File too large. Max 5MB.' }
error_responses.no_file: HTTP 400 with JSON { error: 'No file provided' }

user_context.answering_style: Short and decisive. States limits clearly when asked.
